rationale: This message is an automated dependency scan report generated by a CI scanner (Grype), not a human-authored vulnerability report. The sender is a no-reply scanner address, the subject includes the scanner tag [velox-stream-scanner], and the body is a structured machine-generated listing of CVE/GHSA identifiers with severity scores and fix versions. One of the findings is already tracked. This pattern matches the automated-scanner class regardless of whether the project uses ASF or non-ASF infrastructure — the scanner origin and structured dump format are the discriminating signal.
